channel.title: Ribbon on 迩东陈的博客
channel.description: Recent content in Ribbon on 迩东陈的博客

item.title: Spring Cloud之Ribbon(H版)
item.description: 前言：Spring Cloud之Ribbon(H版)。 Spring Cloud之Ribbon(H版) 一、ribbon简介 Ribbon is a client side load balancer which gives you a lot of control over the behaviour of HTTP and TCP clients. Feign already uses Ribbon, so if you are using @FeignClient then this section also applies. —–摘自官网 ribbon是一个负载均衡客户端，可以很好的控制 http 和 tcp 的一些行为。Feign默认集成了r
